extract: Brava Arena (Japanese: 舞台の戦場 Stage Battlefield) is an area located in the northern region of the Crimson Mirelands of Hisui. It lies north of Cloudpool Ridge and west of the Shrouded Ruins. It is the place where the noble Lilligant, Lady of the Ridge (Japanese: 峠クイーン Queen of the Ridge), resides. Lilligant is fought here as part of Mission 8: "Arezu's Predicament" to calm her of her frenzy. Warden Arezu of the Diamond Clan tends to Lilligant here initially. After Arezu takes over Edith's job as hairdresser in Jubilife Village, Warden Calaba of the Pearl Clan watches over Lilligant in her stead and handles rematches with the noble.
